meaning: adj.<法>困难的,固执的,难以相处的
examples: In England and Wales there are over 50,000 cases of Clostridium difficile each year.
Clostridium difficile colitis remains a serious and common complication after liver transplantation.
Animal research with Sb shows interference with Clostridium difficile, a common bacterial cause of diarrhea.
And last year deaths from C-difficile went up in Wales, but fell sharply in England.
We're making real progress against MRSA but the war against another infection, C-difficile, must be intensified.
